featureName: Email Threading — Dedup, Order, Sent/Received Display
description: Fix email thread handling: deduplicate emails during IMAP sync, fix conversation grouping for sent replies, correct thread ordering (chronological), add sent/received visual distinction in threads, and include sent replies in inbox thread view.

userStories.title: Deduplicate emails during IMAP sync
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want duplicate emails to be prevented during sync so that my inbox doesn't show the same message twice.
acceptanceCriteria: email-sync.service.ts checks if message_id already exists for team before inserting
Duplicate emails (same message_id + team_id) are skipped silently
DB migration adds UNIQUE constraint on (team_id, message_id) WHERE message_id IS NOT NULL
Existing duplicates are cleaned up in migration (keep oldest row per message_id+team_id)
Lint passes

userStories.title: Store in_reply_to_header on sent emails for threading
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want my sent replies to be properly grouped into their parent conversation thread.
acceptanceCriteria: smtp.service.ts stores in_reply_to_header (parent message_id) when saving sent email to DB
generateConversationId resolves same conversation_id for both received and sent emails in a thread
Sent replies that have References header get correct conversation_id via Priority 1 (root message_id)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Currently smtp.service.ts saves in_reply_to (UUID FK) and references, but NOT in_reply_to_header which generateConversationId depends on.

userStories.title: Fix thread ordering to chronological (oldest first)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want conversation threads to display in chronological order (oldest message at top) like Gmail, so I can follow the conversation flow naturally.
acceptanceCriteria: getConversationEmails returns emails sorted oldest → newest (ascending received_at)
ConversationThread renders emails in this order (oldest at top, newest at bottom)
groupEmailsByConversation preserves correct thread_order assignment
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Current getConversationEmails sorts by b.thread_order - a.thread_order (reverse). Thread views in email clients universally show chronological top-to-bottom.

userStories.title: Add sent/received visual distinction in thread view
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to visually distinguish between emails I sent and emails I received within a conversation thread, so I can follow who said what.
acceptanceCriteria: Sent emails in thread show 'Vous' or connection email as sender with a distinct visual style (e.g. right-aligned or blue tint)
Received emails show sender name with default style
Each thread item shows sender name + timestamp as a header above the email body
Direction badge or icon (arrow up = sent, arrow down = received) is visible
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Currently EmailThreadItem shows no sender header at all — just body content. Need to add sender + direction + time header.

userStories.title: Include sent replies in inbox conversation threads
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see my sent replies alongside received emails when viewing a conversation thread, so I have the complete conversation context.
acceptanceCriteria: When viewing inbox and selecting a conversation parent, sent emails from the same thread are included in the thread view
The page.tsx SSR and the API fetch both sent + received emails when building the initial email list for a folder
Thread count (N messages) reflects the total including sent emails
Sent folder still works independently (shows only sent emails)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Currently inbox fetches only direction='received'. Sent replies are completely absent from thread views. Need to also fetch sent emails that belong to threads present in the current view.
